How it works

Three steps to a showroom shine.

We've made booking a premium detail as easy as ordering food.

01

Book your detail

Fill out the quick form or text 732-955-1026. We'll confirm your package, date, and location.

02

We come to you

Your driveway, office parking lot, beach rental — we bring all the supplies and tools. Just need access to an outdoor water spigot and outlet.

03

Shine guaranteed

We don't leave until you're thrilled. Pay through Square right from your phone. Done.

Our story

Built locally. Earned every review.

Summer-Salt started last summer — just Christian in his driveway with a pressure washer and one goal: make every car look brand new.

One year, dozens of happy customers, and a wall of 5-star reviews later, we're a full crew bringing premium mobile detailing across Ocean County.

Where we go

We come to you — across all of Ocean County.

Based out of Seaside Heights, we serve Toms River and the surrounding Jersey Shore. As long as you're in our area and have an outdoor water spigot and outlet we can plug into, we'll come right to your driveway.

Not sure if we cover you? Text us
  • Seaside Heights
  • Toms River
  • Lavallette
  • Brick
  • Point Pleasant
  • Lakewood
  • Bayville
  • Manchester
  • Island Heights
  • Ortley Beach
Outside this list? Just ask. We often travel further for larger jobs or fleet bookings — small travel fee may apply.

Common questions

Everything you need to know.

If you don't see your question here, just text us at (732) 955-1026 — we usually reply within an hour.

How long does a detail take?

Most Standard Packages take about 2–3 hours depending on vehicle size and condition. Premium Packages typically run 3.5–5 hours because of the deep cleaning, clay bar, and protection steps. We'll give you a more accurate time when we confirm your booking.

Do I need to provide water or electricity?

Yes — we'll need access to an outdoor water spigot and a standard 110V electrical outlet. We bring all the cleaning supplies, tools, hoses, and equipment ourselves. You just need to make sure we have a hookup at your location.

If you're not sure your spot has these, just text us before booking and we'll figure it out together.

Do I need to be home during the detail?

Not at all. As long as the vehicle is accessible and we can confirm payment ahead of time, you can be at work, the beach, or anywhere else. Many of our customers leave us their keys and come home to a finished car.

How do I pay?

When you book online, Square holds a 20% deposit on your card to lock in your appointment. The remaining balance can be paid however you like:

💳 Card — tap, dip, or auto-charged from the card on file
💵 Cash — pay on arrival
📱 Venmo or Zelle — quick and easy
✨ Apple Pay / Google Pay — straight from your phone

Just let us know your preference when we arrive, or before if you have a question. No surprise fees, no awkward checkout.

Why do you require a deposit?

We hold a 20% deposit when you book to confirm your appointment time. Detailing takes 2–4 hours, and we block off our whole day around your booking — sometimes turning down other customers in your area.

The deposit gets applied directly to your final bill — it's not an extra fee, it just locks in your spot.

Cancellation policy:

✅ 24+ hours notice — full refund of your deposit, no questions asked
⏰ Less than 24 hours — deposit is forfeit (this rarely happens, but it covers our day)
🌧️ Weather or our cancellation — we reschedule with no penalty

How does Shine Club work?

Shine Club is our monthly membership. Text us at (732) 955-1026 with "SHINE CLUB" + your vehicle to sign up — no online form, just a quick conversation.

Pricing:

🌅 15% off every single detail — forever, as long as you're a member
📅 One full detail per month, same day each month (we hold it for you)
💳 Pay at the time of each detail — card, cash, Venmo, Apple Pay

No subscriptions, no auto-billing, no surprise charges. Just a locked-in monthly slot at a member price.

Is there a commitment for Shine Club?

3-month minimum commitment — after that, it's month-to-month.

This protects both of us: we reserve your monthly slot (turning down other customers for that day), and in exchange you commit to 3 details minimum. It's our way of making sure everyone's on the same page.

After the first 3 months, you can cancel anytime with 14 days notice before your next scheduled detail. No cancellation fees, no hassle.

Can I pause my Shine Club membership?

Yes! Members can pause for up to 1 month per year — perfect for vacations, extreme weather seasons, or if you're having your car worked on. Just text us at least 7 days before your next scheduled detail and we'll pause your slot.

When you come back, your slot is still reserved at the same day/time — no reshuffling.

What if I miss a Shine Club detail?

Life happens. Here's how we handle it:

✅ Reschedule with 24+ hours notice — we'll find another day that month, no penalty
⏰ Less than 24 hours / no-show — the monthly detail is forfeited (we reserved the full slot)
🌧️ Weather or our cancellation — always rescheduled, no penalty

Unused monthly details do NOT roll over into the next month — each month is its own.

What if my car is really dirty? Will the price go up?

Our listed prices cover most vehicles in normal condition. If a car needs significantly more time — heavy pet hair, deep stains, mold, construction debris, etc. — we'll let you know upfront before we start. No surprise charges, ever.

How often should I get my car detailed?

For most people, we recommend a Standard Package every 2–3 months to keep your car in top shape. Premium Packages with our 6-month spray protection extend that to every 4–6 months. Living near the shore means salt air is rough on your finish — regular detailing protects your paint and resale value.

Do you offer fleet, commercial, or recurring discounts?

Yes — text us about fleet, commercial, dealership, or recurring monthly bookings. We offer custom pricing for ongoing relationships.

What if it rains on my appointment?

If the weather looks rough, we'll reach out the day before to reschedule for free. We'd rather move your booking than rush a detail in bad conditions and not give you our best work.
